message:
fix(connectors): inline Gemini scan-root closure, qualify Kimi method call, add Path import to AMP

Gemini connector: eliminate the add_explicit closure that captured
mutable state and was called in two places (scan roots loop + data_dir).
Inlining makes control flow more explicit -- the data_dir checks are now
a separate block after the scan roots loop. Same behavioral checks
(looks_like_root, .gemini/tmp probing) apply to both paths.

Kimi connector: add Self:: qualifier to looks_like_kimi_storage(base)
call since it is an associated function on KimiConnector impl, not a
free function.

AMP connector: add Path to the std::path::{PathBuf} import to supply
the type needed for scan root function signatures taking &Path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
